name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Gold Card Membership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
You're just one step away from an exclusive Gold Card membership... |

Peter,

We're launching the Official Gold Card to show your support for our AMERICA FIRST agenda and the opportunity to become a member has never been better...
[](http://click1.action.gop.com/nywcrhybpzwndhdhntmtyngyjgnbjjtmcfdtfqgqfftkrw_wnldnnzssfg.html?a=1237&b=86868&c=17786605)
[**Become an OFFICIAL GOLD CARD Member with a one-time contribution of just~~$35~~ $5 before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to have your _*PERSONALIZED*_ OFFICIAL GOLD CARD sent directly to you.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/akmvtzkcpwbnhzhznygyknrksrncssygvdhydmrmddyltm_wnldnnzssfg.html?a=1237&b=86868&c=17786605)

You've done a lot for our Party, and you deserve to be rewarded.

Be sure to act now, because there are only a few hundred available for the select few who know to step up when an opportunity is this big...

[**Contribute just~~$35~~ $5 before the 11:45 PM deadline to get your _*personalized*_ OFFICIAL GOLD CARD while supplies last.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/mqqzbgqjdkwlngngltvtqlmqsmljsstvzyntycmcyytpbq_wnldnnzssfg.html?a=1237&b=86868&c=17786605)

Thank you,

[](http://click1.action.gop.com/zmpgwjmcltzksjsjkbqbmkvmdvkcddbqgpsbprvrppbfwp_wnldnnzssfg.html?a=1237&b=86868&c=17786605)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

And Peter, I know this would look great in your wallet. [**Contribute just $5 before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to get your OFFICIAL GOLD CARD.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/srczsfrgkdjtmfmftchcrtwrlwtgllchzvmcvbwbvvcpsc_wnldnnzssfg.html?a=1237&b=86868&c=17786605)

[GET YOUR GOLD CARD](http://click1.action.gop.com/jrvzqhrpmdswvhvhwtktrwcrfcwpfftkzjvtjbcbjjtnqv_wnldnnzssfg.html?a=1237&b=86868&c=17786605)

Paid for by the Republican National Committee
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.GOP.com](http://click1.action.gop.com/mqdzbgqjdkwlngngltvtqlmqsmljsstvzyntycmcyytpbd_wnldnnzssfg.html?a=17786605)
You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Republican National Committee (RNC), 310 1st St SE Washington, DC, 20003-1885, US

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click1.action.gop.com/zmwgwjmcltzksjsjkbqbmkvmdvkcddbqgpsbprvrppbfww_wnldnnzssfg.html?a=17786605) | [Unsubscribe](http://click1.action.gop.com/mqszbgqjdkwlngngltvtqlmqsmljsstvzyntycmcyytpbs_wnldnnzssfg.html?a=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&b=17786605)

name: GregforMontana.com
subject: FWD: Bernie Sanders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana
body:
There's still time left to help Greg hit his goal of raising $100,000 before the end of Bernie Sanders' campaign swing in Montana. _And Friend, we are so close. |
Friend,

There's still time left to help Greg hit his goal of raising $100,000 before the end of Bernie Sanders' campaign swing in Montana. _And Friend, we are so close._

**[Will you chip in at least $10 before midnight tonight to help us reach our goal?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390677:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**

Less than 5 days remain before this Special Election is over. We hope Greg can count on you today.

Thanks,

**[GregforMontana.com](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390677:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**

| [** Donate Today >> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390677:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)
---

* * *

**From:** Greg Gianforte
**Date:** Friday, May 19, 2017
**Subject:** Bernie Sanders is coming to Montana

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390677:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)
---
Friend,

Have you seen the latest polls? **_It's bad_.**

We could lose this race, and the Democrat Machine knows it. _**That's why they're deploying Bernie Sanders to Montana this weekend.**_

D.C. Democrats and liberal special interest groups are sending Bernie to campaign for my opponent, believing his socialist star power will help raise enough money to buy this election.

**[That's why I need your urgent help to raise an additional $100,000 before Bernie's Montana campaign swing this weekend- May 20th to 21st. Can you chip in to help me fight back, Friend?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390677:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**

**[Fight back $25](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390678:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
**[Fight back $50](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390679:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
**[Fight back $100](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390680:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
**[Fight back $250](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390681:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
**[Fight back other amount](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390677:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
The election is days away, and my opponent is polling within striking distance.

Democrats think that if they win in Montana, it will open the floodgates for liberal victories nationwide, making up for their embarrassing losses last year.

Friend, we cannot allow Bernie Sanders and his leftist allies to overtake our grassroots movement and inflict their failed, socialist agenda on Montana.

**[Will you help me fight back by making an emergency contribution today?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390677:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**

**[Fight back $25](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390678:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
**[Fight back $50](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390679:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
**[Fight back $100](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390680:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
**[Fight back $250](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390681:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
**[Fight back other amount](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390677:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
Victory is still within reach, but I alone cannot fend off the Democrat Machine, Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and the liberal special interest groups that are funneling money into this race to defeat me.

**[Please help me send a clear message to Bernie Sanders and his leftist allies in Washington that this race is not for sale and their Big Government agenda has no place in Montana.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390677:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**

We are running out of time, Friend. I hope you will stand with me today, before it's too late.

Thanks for your support.

Greg Gianforte

P.S. Bernie Sanders is about to start a major push in Montana, and I am concerned if we don't raise an additional $100,000 before the end of his campaign tour, we'll fall behind. **[Friend, if you're still with Team Gianforte, please help us fight back by helping us reach our goal.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390677:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**

**[Fight back $25](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390678:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
**[Fight back $50](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390679:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
**[Fight back $100](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390680:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
**[Fight back $250](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390681:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**
**[Fight back other amount](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/42390677:s1NNKW2N6:m:1:1494336505:B76AC0B6E66CE2C354425475C6966E2F:r)**

| Paid for by Greg for Montana

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
Last Tuesday evening, Gov. John Kasich and Sen. Bernie Sanders
participated in a spirited discussion about how Republicans and
Democrats can find common ground on some of America's greatest
challenges.

Peter, last Tuesday evening,
Gov. John Kasich and Sen. Bernie Sanders participated in a
spirited discussion about how Republicans and Democrats can find
common ground on some of America's greatest challenges. Watch the
CNN Town Hall Discussion (here).

Also, in case you missed it, you
can read Gov. Kasich's latest op-ed:

• CNN: The Time for
Bipartisanship is Now

Last week, Gov. Kasich
participated in a forum with Cleveland Clinic CEO Toby Cosgrove
to discuss the future of healthcare and the promising innovations
that will help America address drug addiction, Alzheimer's and
autism. You can watch the event (here).

While on the road for his recent
book tour, Gov. Kasich spent some time talking with Yahoo's Matt
Bai, reflecting on his presidential campaign and his drive to
help heal America's divisions. Below is an excerpt:

"A politician couldn't look for
validation in crowds, Kasich told me, sounding a little like a
therapist. You had to do what seemed right and feel good about
it.

"I'm so happy with myself!" he
burst out then. "I'm so happy with this book! I'm so happy with
this tour. I'm so happy with how my family is being treated, the
way my friends look at me and talk to me. It's great! And there's
not a single thing I would change!

"I'm a happy guy," he said, "and
not looking forward to another political campaign, no matter how
hard that is for people to believe."

The thing is, to my own surprise,
I did believe him. And that's actually the best prism through
which to understand what Kasich is doing.

Those of us who follow politics
for a long time tend to see everything as tactical, the
transparent means to some carefully calculated end. When a
politician who's out there writing books and giving speeches says
"I don't know" to another campaign, what we hear is: "I'm not at
the announcement phase of the PowerPoint yet."

But there are times, you come to
learn, when a politician is motivated more by self-image than
self-interest. There are moments - John McCain in 2000 comes to
mind - when a candidate falls almost by accident into a public
role that seems, at least for a while, to have awakened in him
some sense of a larger purpose…"

"What happened was that Kasich's
public persona finally came into line with the way he always
hoped people would see him - as a kind of self-helpy,
statesmanlike figure, less concerned with partisan pressure than
with the judgment of some higher power. If you disagree with him
now, he's as likely to bear-hug you as to jab a finger in your
face.

So when Kasich says he isn't
plotting to unseat an old rival whose approval rating has fallen
to 36 percent, when he says he has nothing more to prove and no
idea what's next, I tend to take him at his word.

And if I were Trump, and if I
hoped to commandeer the party for another term after this one,
maybe that's exactly why I'd start to worry.

In politics, nothing's quite so
dangerous as a guy who considers himself the instrument of a
larger plan, even if he doesn't yet have one of his own."

Read the full story (here).

Thank you for your ongoing
support!

-Team Kasich

P.S. In case you missed the news
about our exclusive offer, we have some copies of Gov. Kasich's
new book, Two Paths: America Divided or United, and we'd like to
send you a copy as a thank you if you'll make a generous
contribution to help us spread his message.

>>Chip in $50 Now<<
Receive a copy of the book

>>Chip in $150 or More<<
Receive a signed copy of the book

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.

http://email.sermodigital.com/p/isVQGKW2NP

name: Scott Arceneaux
subject: Stand up; fight back
body:
#
Team --
Yet again, more infuriating policy is coming from the Trump administration. This time, he's proposing to slash critical programs like Medicaid and food assistance that millions of Floridians rely upon.
They think that we're going to get outrage fatigue -- that eventually, we'll just give in. Well today, we're going to send a powerful message to Trump and his allies -- we won't give up. We won't give in. And they had better be ready for the 2018 election.
[**If you 're ready to stand up and fight back against these cruel cuts, chip in to our campaign now to help us fight back in 2018 >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3355/9e00690/48ef7a36/240376a1/967403506/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170521-trump")
We need a Governor who isn't afraid to stand up to the White House to protect their constituents. Rick Scott now has only worked to aid and abet Trump in these cruel practices.
It's time for something different -- it's time to elect a Governor who will fight for Floridians before his party. And that's the Governor Florida will get if we elect Andrew Gillum.
[**Chip in to our campaign now to help us make sure that happens >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3355/9e00690/48ef7a36/240376a1/967403506/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170521-trump")
Together, we're going to stand up against Trump, and together, we're going to win.
Bring it home,
Scott Arceneaux
Chief Strategist
Andrew Gillum for Governor
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3355/9e00690/48ef7a36/240376a1/967403506/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170521-trump")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3355/9e00690/48ef7a36/240376a0/967403506/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3355/9e00690/48ef7a36/240376a3/967403506/VEsD/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3355/9e00690/48ef7a36/240376a2/967403506/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
